_comment: SSOT for the headline benchmark numbers quoted in README.md. The docs-consistency CI check (tests/docs/docs-consistency.test.ts) parses the same numbers out of the README prose and asserts they equal these pinned values within tolerance, so README metrics can never silently drift from the pinned truth.
_regenerate: These are the reranked-hybrid headline metrics. To refresh from a real bench run: `npm run bench` (retrieval: MRR / nDCG@5 / Recall@3 on the committed text-embedding-v4 fixture) and `npm run bench:accuracy` (grounded-answer faithfulness). Copy the reranked-hybrid row + grounding figure here and update the README prose in the same commit.
_source: README.md reranked-hybrid retrieval result + grounded-answer accuracy section
